message:
viz: premium dark UI refresh for spec evolution viewer

This is a usability + visual polish pass on the standalone spec-evolution viewer HTML.

Deploy marker
- Add an HTML comment deploy hash (`2026-02-08-PREMIUM-DARK-V2`) near the top of the document for quick verification of what is live.

Visual system / CSS
- Replace the prior neon/CRT-heavy palette with a "premium dark" system:
  - New surface stack (`--surface-1/2/3`), text ramp (`--text-primary/secondary/tertiary`), glass header/dock variables, consistent border/shadow/radius/transition tokens.
  - Update typography defaults (Inter system stack + JetBrains Mono/Fira Code), and enable better font smoothing.
- Main container gets a subtle radial gradient background.
- Tabs restyled into a compact pill control; scroll padding increased for readability.
- Spec content typography improved (heading weights/sizes, inline code + pre block styling, overflow wrapping).

Sidebar / commit list
- Add a dedicated sidebar header section with an always-visible filter input.
- Commit list items are now "cards" with hover/selected states and subject line clamping for dense scanning.

Dock / timeline controls
- Dock restyled with glass treatment and simplified button chrome.
- Evolution map refined (smaller, cleaner canvas; improved range thumb; overflow hidden).
- The "REANIMATE" play button is hidden/disabled (see JS changes) to keep navigation deterministic.

Mobile behavior
- Sidebar becomes a drawer on small screens with a dimmed/blurred backdrop.
- Add click-outside-to-close for the drawer and stop propagation on the LOGS button to avoid immediate close.
- Mobile paddings/touch targets adjusted (notably the slider thumb).

Effects/perf guardrails
- Disable CRT/lab effects and periodic HUD/electric/particle work (functions become no-ops) so optional visuals cannot compromise load/render stability.
- Loading overlay changed to a minimal spinner + "INITIALIZING" label.

JS/markup touch-ups
- Dock details color aligned to `--text-tertiary`.
- Commit-card date color migrated from the old `--fg-dim` to `--text-tertiary`.
